ticket_created_at: Your Ticket has been created at:
create_ticket_1: Click on the Button to create
pick_category_1: Click one of the Buttons to open a Ticket for the according Category.
ticket_created_channel_1: A moderator will support you soon.
ticket_created_channel_close: Click the button if you want to close the ticket.
pick_moderator_action: Click on the Button with the Moderator Action you want to execute.
pick_user_for_mod: Pick the User you want to add as Moderator.
pick_user_to_add: Pick the User you want to add to the Ticket.
add_patchnote_node: Add a new patchnote node by selecting a status below.
patchnote_add_node_modal_placeholder_des: Describe the planned or completed change in detail...
patchnote_create_success: Added {count} patch note node(s) with status {status}.
patchnote_create_failure: Failed to save patch note node: {error}
patchnote_section_empty: No patchnote nodes have been added yet.
patchnote_no_nodes: No patchnote nodes with status `done` or `planned` to {action}.
patchnote_select_delete_placeholder: Select a patch note node to delete...
patchnote_select_edit_placeholder: Select a patch note node to edit...
patchnote_select_delete_prompt: Choose a patchnote node to delete:
patchnote_select_edit_prompt: Choose a patchnote node to edit:
patchnote_node_delete_not_found: Could not find the selected patch note node.
patchnote_node_edit_not_found: Could not find the selected patch note node.
